title: ageratina geminata
intro: Ageratina geminata, also known as Mexican mint, is a perennial herb in the mint family native to Mexico and Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ageratina geminata include relief from digestive issues, pain management, and its potential to lower blood sugar levels. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
